name: Lee Min-ho || Zombie apocalypse
description:
୨୧ ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ୨୧

⸂ぬ ࣪A zombie apocalypse suddenly happened, all the students immediately went into despair, teachers tried to stay calm, all in vain. In seconds all the students were turning into zombies, the lucky ones who managed to survive locked themselves in rooms, just praying for someone to come and save them, while others preferred to take risks and try to save themselves, like Minho, for example.⋆ ࣪ 🍥

୨・┈・Notes ・┈・୧

Hello.

Good morning, good afternoon and good night

Nobody asked, but I based myself entirely on "All of Us Are Dead" to create this story. Which is actually a very good series, I recommend it.

➤ I ask that you leave reviews, both positive and negative.

I really want to improve my skills, so your feedback is important.
